arts.ttl: Gay Arsenal fan Matt Lucas takes aim at rainbow-refusenik footballers and reveals he has been abused and called a 'f***ing queer ****' at matches
arts.sum: It comes after devout Christian Marc Guehi chose to write 'I love Jesus' over his rainbow armband at the weekend, before wearing a second on Tuesday at Ipswich that read: 'Jesus loves you'.

arts.ttl: Tyrell Malacia transfer claim rubbished – Reasons given for lack of interest in Manchester United player
arts.sum: Tyrell Malacia made his return to the Manchester United first-team last week. He started for Ruben Amorim’s side against Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League and while his performance wasn’t the most convincing, it was only the start of a potential resurgence under a new manager. arts.ttl: Man United players abandoned plans to wear LGBTQ+ jackets after Noussair Mazraoui religious stance
arts.sum: The Moroccan defender was joined by teammates in refusing to take part in the walkout due to his Muslim faith

arts.ttl: 19-year-old “aware” of Man United, Arsenal & Liverpool transfer interest
arts.sum: Juventus star Kenan Yildiz is reportedly aware of interest from Manchester United, Arsenal and Liverpool, among others. arts.ttl: 'I was Liverpool star who made it to World Cup final – I dreamt of Arsenal but it didn’t happen'
arts.sum: Ryan Babel enjoyed four years at Liverpool after joining the club in 2007, but the Dutchman has admitted he would have loved to play for the Reds' rivals Arsenal

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'make informal approach' for AC Milan star
arts.sum: Arsenal allegedly make what is described as 'an informal approach' for one of AC Milan's star players ahead of the 2025 transfer windows.
